description_long: This object is a realistic peach with a round, slightly flattened shape and a subtle crease running from top to bottom. Its skin is a gradient of soft pink, yellow, and orange hues, with a velvety texture and a faint blush on one side. One half of the peach is shown cut open, revealing a juicy, golden-yellow interior and a large, textured brown pit at the center. The cut surface appears moist and fibrous, with a natural sheen that suggests ripeness. The whole peach displays a gentle indentation at the top where the stem would be, but no stem or leaf is present. The surface is smooth and unblemished, with no visible marks or imperfections.
description: A round, velvety peach with a pink-yellow gradient skin and a juicy, golden interior with a visible pit. The surface is smooth, ripe, and free of blemishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing both a whole peach and a cut half, with the pit and juicy interior clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the thickness of the peach and the depth of the cut section.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded back and subtle crease of the whole peach, with no cut surface visible.
description_view_3: Top-down view focusing on the peach's gentle indentation and the edge of the cut section.
